payload.answer: No conflict. The new information is a duplicate of an existing memory and should not create a new durable memory card.
citations: Existing memory: "Sam from Goldman mentioned that he likes Bill Evans."
New memory: "Sam from Goldman said he likes Bill Evans."

entity_resolution.reason: The new statement matches the existing memory in meaning and entities: Sam from Goldman liking Bill Evans.

details: Compared semantic content of existing and new memory.
Detected same subject (Sam from Goldman), same preference relation (likes), and same object (Bill Evans).
Classified as duplicate and avoided redundant storage.
